royalties.title: Royalties
royalties.subtitle: Track calculations, payments and adjustments by shop and tenant.

restricted.title: Limited access
restricted.description: Your profile cannot access the royalties module.
restricted.manage: Your profile cannot create or modify royalties.

hints.selectCalculation: Select a calculation to manage its lifecycle.
hints.chooseCalculation: Choose a calculation from the list to display its details.
hints.quickCreation: Calculate royalties from validated sales in the selected shop, tenant and period.

empty.noPayment: No payment is linked to this calculation.

messages.loadFailed: Royalty data could not be loaded.
messages.shopAndTenantRequired: Select a shop and tenant before creating a calculation.
messages.calculationSaveFailed: The royalty calculation could not be saved.
messages.statusUpdateFailed: The status could not be updated.
messages.paymentExceedsBalance: The entered amount exceeds the outstanding balance.
messages.paymentSaveFailed: The payment could not be saved.
messages.adjustmentFieldsRequired: The adjustment amount and reason are required.
messages.adjustmentSaveFailed: The adjustment could not be saved.
